description: Establish a "Green Wave" on the Bologna Pasubio corridor by optimizing the offset of the first traffic light to minimize vehicle waiting time. Create a Python script at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/optimize_offset.py to automate a parameter sweep of offset values from 0 to 120 in steps of 10 for the first <tlLogic> element in /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_tls.add.xml. The script must run the headless SUMO simulation (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg) for each offset, calculate the total waitingTime from /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/tripinfos.xml, and export the results to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/offset_results.csv with headers 'offset' and 'total_waiting_time'. Generate a final XML file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/best_tls.add.xml containing the TLS definitions with the offset value that minimized the total waiting time.
